_meta.description: Brand name (India-market common brands) -> generic name + drug class. Take-home scope: a curated sample list. Production would source this from a licensed pharma database (e.g. CIMS, RxNorm-equivalent for Indian brands) and refresh on a schedule, since brand catalogs change and vary by region.
_meta.matching_strategy: normalize (lowercase, strip dosage strength/form suffixes like '500mg', 'tab', 'inj') then exact match against brand_names; unresolved -> pass through raw value with medicine_type='unmapped_brand_or_generic'
